snippet.title: Aashaan - Official Trailer | Johnpaul George | Indrans | Joemon Jyothir.ASHN TRAILER 4K
snippet.description:
Aashaan is an upcoming dramedy film written and directed by Johnpaul George, produced
under the banner of Guppy Cinemas in association with Wayfarer Films releasing in theaters on
5th February 2026.
Cast: INDRANS, JOEMON JYOTHIR, SHOBI THILAKAN, BIBIN PERUMBILLI, ABIN BINO,
MADAN GOWRI amoung others.

Welcome to our Tamil Devotional Channel, your ultimate destination for soulful and uplifting Tamil devotional songs. Dive into the divine with our carefully curated collections designed to inspire and bring peace to your soul every day of the week.

Daily Devotional Songs:
* Monday Tamil Devotional Songs
* Tuesday Tamil Devotional Songs
* Wednesday Tamil Devotional Songs
* Thursday Tamil Devotional Songs
* Friday Tamil Devotional Songs
* Saturday Tamil Devotional Songs
* Sunday Tamil Devotional Songs

Special Devotional Collections:
* Shiva Tamil Devotional Songs: Celebrate the power and grace of Lord Shiva.
* Vishnu Tamil Devotional Songs: Immerse in the blessings of Lord Vishnu.
* Muruga Tamil Devotional Songs: Invoke the valor and blessings of Lord Muruga.
* Hanuman Tamil Devotional Songs: Feel the strength and devotion of Lord Hanuman.
* Amman Tamil Devotional Songs: Honor the divine mother in her various forms.
* Saibaba Tamil Devotional Songs: Seek the blessings of Shirdi Sai Baba.
* Balaji Tamil Devotional Songs: Worship Lord Venkateswara with these soulful songs.
* Lakshmi Tamil Devotional Songs: Attract prosperity with hymns for Goddess Lakshmi.
* Devi Tamil Devotional Songs: Praise the supreme goddess Devi in her many avatars.
* Ganesh Tamil Devotional Songs: Start your day with prayers to Lord Ganesha.

Special Occasions and Deities:
* Amavasai Tamil Devotional Songs: Songs for the new moon day rituals.
* Pradosham Tamil Devotional Songs: Hymns for the auspicious Pradosham period.
* Ashta Lakshmi Tamil Devotional Songs: Songs dedicated to the eight forms of Goddess Lakshmi.
* Vinayagar Tamil Devotional Songs: Devotions for the remover of obstacles, Lord Vinayagar.
* Ganapathi Tamil Devotional Songs: Invoke blessings from Lord Ganapathi.
* Surya Tamil Devotional Songs: Worship the Sun God, Surya, with these melodies.
* Sani Tamil Devotional Songs: Appease Lord Sani with these devotional tracks.
* Guru Tamil Devotional Songs: Songs to honor Guru and seek his wisdom.
* Perumal Tamil Devotional Songs: Devote to Lord Perumal with these spiritual songs.
* Navagraha Tamil Devotional Songs: Balance your energies with songs for the nine planets.

Subscribe now and join our spiritual journey. Like, share, and hit the bell icon to stay updated with our latest devotional uploads. May these divine songs bring peace, prosperity, and positivity to your life.

snippet.title: Booyah Premier League 2026 | Day 1 Part 1
snippet.description:
Welcome to the Booyah Premier League 2026рЯТОрЯПП
YouвАЩve seen your favorite Free Fire MAX creators dominate the battlefield рЯОЃNow watch them rule the cricket field рЯППрЯФ•
All your favorite Free Fire MAX creators & esports athletes under one stadium, fighting for that one Booyah Premier League trophy рЯПЖрЯТ•

рЯФ•Kiski fielding hogi set? Kiss ka balla karega halla?рЯППрЯТА

Match Schedule- Day 1
Stream 1: 
31st Jan - Match 1 - 9:30 AM - Solara Sultans vs Bermuda Blasters
31st Jan - Match 2 - 11:20 AM - Nexterra Nawabs vs Kalahari Knights
31st Jan - Match 3 - 1:10 PM - Peak Panthers vs Solara Sultans

Next Up: Stream 2: https://youtube.com/live/KgiBFgyiHjI?feature=share 
31st Jan - Match 4 - 3:30 PM - Alpine Aces vs Nexterra Nawabs
31st Jan - Match 5 - 5:20 PM - Peak Panthers vs Bermuda Blasters
31st Jan - Match 6 - 7:10 PM - Kalahari Knights vs Alpine Aces


Who will lift the trophy?рЯПЖрЯОК

snippet.title: AmвАҐbeng Pante || Official Music Video || Saldorik S Dio feat Janggisa ||
snippet.description:
Written & Composed by Saldorik S Dio

Ia git-o AmвАҐbeng Pante Salgro meвАҐtrako jorana basegenchimoba kuвАҐbipektangko kuвАҐgalgija ripingna kangвАҐkare kaaniko miksonga aro meвАҐtrana amвАҐbeng jolni nitoaniko aro namgipa dakbewalrangkoba parake aganaha.

Cast- James Libang & Sita Samnam
Modern Cultural Dance- DoвАҐkaku Art & Cultural Association, Tura (D.A.C.A)
Wangala- Nokatgre Youth Cultural Club

Credit Roles:-   
Music- Kangkan Rabha (Pitch cave studio, Assam)

snippet.title: HONEY TRAILER | NAVEEN CHANDRA | DIVYA PILLAI | DIVI | KARUNA KUMAR | RAVI PEETLA | SEKHAR MASTER
snippet.description:
Nothing here can be trustedвАФnot the memories, not the silence, not even your own thoughts. This psychological horror thriller creeps under your skin, blurring reality until fear feels unavoidable.

HONEY THE MOVIE scheduled for worldwide theatrical release on february 6 2026. 

Credits:
Written & Directed by: KARUNA KUMAR
Producer: RAVI PEETLA
DOP:  NAGESH BANNEL

snippet.title: Border 2 Movie Trailer Review | Sunny Deol Varun Dhawan, Diljit Dosanjh | Songs, Reaction & Box
snippet.description:
Border 2 ek upcoming Bollywood patriotic action-drama movie hai jo 1971 war ke background par based hai. Film mein Sunny Deol, Varun Dhawan, Diljit Dosanjh aur Ahan Shetty jaise strong performers nazar aate hain. Border 2 trailer release hote hi audience ke beech zabardast buzz create ho chuka hai aur log Border 2 trailer review, Border 2 reaction aur Border 2 public review dekh rahe hain.
Border 2 movie ke songs jaise Ishq Da Chehra, Pyaari Lage, Mohabbat Ho Gayi Hai, Ghar Kab Aaoge aur Sandese Aate Hain ne patriotic aur romantic Hindi songs lovers ke dil jeet liye hain. Vishal Mishra, Sonu Nigam, Arijit Singh aur Diljit Dosanjh ke gaane movie ko emotional depth dete hain.
Is video mein aap dekhenge Border 2 movie review, trailer reaction, honest analysis, songs review, performance breakdown, VFX & CGI discussion aur box office prediction. Sunny Deol ke powerful dialogues, Varun Dhawan ke intense army scenes aur Diljit Dosanjh ke emotional moments audience ko theatre tak kheenchne wale hain.
Saath hi is video mein Border 2 box office collection day 1, Border 2 hit or flop, budget, advance booking, Border 3 announcement rumours aur Bollywood latest news in Hindi par bhi baat ki gayi hai.
Agar aapko Border 2 full trailer, Border 2 movie songs, Sunny Deol Border 2 scenes, Varun Dhawan Border 2 memes, Diljit Dosanjh Border 2 song, Bollywood news aur Hindi cinema updates pasand hain, to ye video aapke liye perfect hai.

Witness the rise of 'Bhagavanthudu', a gripping Pan-India cinematic spectacle that questions belief, challenges authority, and unveils a powerful story rooted in truth and rebellion.

With intense performances, striking visuals, and a hard-hitting narrative, 'Bhagavanthudu' promises an unforgettable theatrical experience across languages and regions.

snippet.title: PREM DHILLON: BADMASH | DSP DEV 2 | DEV KHAROUD | New Punjabi Song 2026 | In Cinemas 13th Feb
snippet.description:

рЯУЕ DSP DEV 2 releases in cinemas on 13th February 2026 рЯОђрЯНњ 

Experience the power of new Punjabi song 2026 as Prem Dhillon brings pure attitude and dominance with вАЬBADMASHвАЭ. This high-energy track blends bold lyrics, fearless vibes, and intense music, making it a perfect addition to the list of Prem Dhillon songs and trending Punjabi songs of 2026 рЯТ•

With hard-hitting music by Rass and striking visuals, Badmash reflects the raw spirit of DSP DEV 2, delivering a full-on cinematic Punjabi music experience рЯФКрЯФ•

snippet.title: Bromance Blooms on the Battlefield
snippet.description:
You and your Clan go together like a Hog and Rider, like a Goblin and Gold, like a Builder and a creepy smile. Show up for your bros this Valentine's Day and prove that true love never needs a balance change. Till maintenance do you part.

Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter вЦЇ https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram вЦЇ https://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook вЦЇ https://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 
TikTok вЦЇ https://www.tiktok.com/@clashofclans

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. supr.cl/PlayClashOfClans

From rage-¬≠filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit https://help.supercellsupport.com/clash-of-clans/en/

Privacy Policy:
https://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
https://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

ParentвАЩs Guide:
https://supercell.com/en/parents/

#clashofclans

snippet.title: Class 12 Biology Marathon | Complete Class 12th Biology Revision | Complete 12th Biology In One Shot
snippet.description:
Class 12 Biology Marathon | Complete Class 12th Biology Revision | Complete 12th Biology In One Shot | UP Board Biology Marathon | UP Board Exam 2026 | By Swabhi Mam

Welcome to this Class 12 Biology Marathon, where we provide a comprehensive revision of the entire Class 12 Biology syllabus. This session is tailored for UP Board students preparing for the 2026 board exams. With Swabhi Mam guiding you through every topic, we cover the essentials and help you prepare in a structured, time-efficient manner. Whether you're revising for your final exams or looking to boost your confidence before the big day, this marathon is perfect for all students aiming for success.

In this marathon, we focus on all the important chapters, offering key insights, quick summaries, and techniques to make learning Biology fun and easy. Swabhi Mam breaks down complex concepts into simple, digestible parts that are easy to understand, allowing you to retain the information better.

The marathon covers essential topics like:
Cell Structure and Function
Human Physiology
Plant Physiology
Genetics and Evolution
Ecology
Biotechnology
... and much more!

This session is designed for students who want to complete their 12th Biology revision in one shot, especially for those in the UP Board. Join us as we dive into each chapter with a clear, concise explanation and provide you with all the tips and tricks for scoring high marks.

Don't forget to take notes and share this video with your friends who are also preparing for the 2026 UP Board Exams. Swabhi Mam's expert teaching will give you the perfect roadmap for acing your Biology exam with ease!

#Class12Biology #12thBiologyRevision #UPBoardBiology #BiologyMarathon #UPBoardExam2026 #Complete12thBiology #BiologyInOneShot #UPBoard12thBiology #BiologyRevision #UPBoardStudy #BiologyExamPreparation #BoardExamRevision #BiologyTips #Class12Marathon #12thBoardExams #BiologyBySwabhiMam #UPBoard2026 #BiologyMarathon2026 #StudyWithSwabhiMam #BiologyForUPBoard #BiologySuccess

localized.title: Class 12 Biology Marathon | Complete Class 12th Biology Revision | Complete 12th Biology In One Shot
localized.description:
Class 12 Biology Marathon | Complete Class 12th Biology Revision | Complete 12th Biology In One Shot | UP Board Biology Marathon | UP Board Exam 2026 | By Swabhi Mam

Welcome to this Class 12 Biology Marathon, where we provide a comprehensive revision of the entire Class 12 Biology syllabus. This session is tailored for UP Board students preparing for the 2026 board exams. With Swabhi Mam guiding you through every topic, we cover the essentials and help you prepare in a structured, time-efficient manner. Whether you're revising for your final exams or looking to boost your confidence before the big day, this marathon is perfect for all students aiming for success.

In this marathon, we focus on all the important chapters, offering key insights, quick summaries, and techniques to make learning Biology fun and easy. Swabhi Mam breaks down complex concepts into simple, digestible parts that are easy to understand, allowing you to retain the information better.

The marathon covers essential topics like:
Cell Structure and Function
Human Physiology
Plant Physiology
Genetics and Evolution
Ecology
Biotechnology
... and much more!

This session is designed for students who want to complete their 12th Biology revision in one shot, especially for those in the UP Board. Join us as we dive into each chapter with a clear, concise explanation and provide you with all the tips and tricks for scoring high marks.

Don't forget to take notes and share this video with your friends who are also preparing for the 2026 UP Board Exams. Swabhi Mam's expert teaching will give you the perfect roadmap for acing your Biology exam with ease!

en-IN.title: Class 12 Biology Marathon | Complete Class 12th Biology Revision | Complete 12th Biology In One Shot
en-IN.description:
Class 12 Biology Marathon | Complete Class 12th Biology Revision | Complete 12th Biology In One Shot | UP Board Biology Marathon | UP Board Exam 2026 | By Swabhi Mam

Welcome to this Class 12 Biology Marathon, where we provide a comprehensive revision of the entire Class 12 Biology syllabus. This session is tailored for UP Board students preparing for the 2026 board exams. With Swabhi Mam guiding you through every topic, we cover the essentials and help you prepare in a structured, time-efficient manner. Whether you're revising for your final exams or looking to boost your confidence before the big day, this marathon is perfect for all students aiming for success.

In this marathon, we focus on all the important chapters, offering key insights, quick summaries, and techniques to make learning Biology fun and easy. Swabhi Mam breaks down complex concepts into simple, digestible parts that are easy to understand, allowing you to retain the information better.

The marathon covers essential topics like:
Cell Structure and Function
Human Physiology
Plant Physiology
Genetics and Evolution
Ecology
Biotechnology
... and much more!

This session is designed for students who want to complete their 12th Biology revision in one shot, especially for those in the UP Board. Join us as we dive into each chapter with a clear, concise explanation and provide you with all the tips and tricks for scoring high marks.

Don't forget to take notes and share this video with your friends who are also preparing for the 2026 UP Board Exams. Swabhi Mam's expert teaching will give you the perfect roadmap for acing your Biology exam with ease!

Let the soulful voices of Asha Bhosle and Kumar Sanu transport you to a realm of pure emotion.

вЮЬ  вБ®@Spokeishere

вЮЬ  вБ®@wemmbumc 

minor spoilers below

music from:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9UKPs9ZisfhMJdalnETLRg (tons of the music I use is by AZALI so check him out!) 
https://www.youtube.com/@andreaszoeller (all of the minecraft theme remixes!)

This is a Minecraft video recorded in the Unstable Universe / Unstable SMP that is staged for story-telling purposes; any more staged videos I upload will have a disclaimer in the description saying that they are also staged. Also, a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft. 

music also from: official minecraft soundtrack, official elder scrolls soundtracks, official enderal soundtrack, epidemic sound (https://www.epidemicsound.com), storyblocks (https://www.storyblocks.com), artlist (https://artlist.io), soundstripe (https://www.soundstripe.com), fesliyan studios (https://www.fesliyanstudios.com/royalty-free-music), and envato (https://elements.envato.com/)

snippet.title: аЃ§аѓИаЃ™аѓНаЃ™аѓВаЃЪаЃЃаѓН 2026 аЃЪаЃњаЃ±аЃ™аѓНаЃ™аѓБ аЃЃаѓБаЃ∞аѓБаЃХаЃ©аѓН аЃ™аЃЊаЃЯаЃ≤аѓН|Thaipusam Padalgal | аЃОаЃЯаѓНаЃЯаѓБаЃХаѓНаЃХаѓБаЃЯаЃњ аЃЃаѓБаЃ∞аѓБаЃХаЃ©аѓБаЃХаѓНаЃХаѓБ| Murugan | Kavadi
snippet.description:
Album Name : Ettukudi Muruganukku - аЃОаЃЯаѓНаЃЯаѓБаЃХаѓНаЃХаѓБаЃЯаЃњ аЃЃаѓБаЃ∞аѓБаЃХаЃ©аѓБаЃХаѓНаЃХаѓБ"
Sung By : Mahanadhi Shobana
Music By : Kanmani Raja & D V Ramani
Lyrics By : Mugilan
Produced By : Unique Recording

May Lord Murugan Bless You All!The word "Thaipusam" is a combination of two words, Thai + Pusam. Thai is the name of the month and Pusam is the name of a star. The Pusam star attains its apogee position during this festival.  It is said that during this period Parvati handed over Murugan a Vel (spear) to defeat Soorapadman, a ferocious demon. Among the two schools of thought, one believes that Thaipusam is celebrated as Murugan's birthday, while the other is of the view that Murugan's birthday  falls in month of Vaikhasi  (May/June).

The album "Ettukudi Muruganukku" is dedicated to Murugan, the benevolent, kind hearted, the blessed God. May Murugan bless all his worshipers with peace, joy, and prosperity.

snippet.title: Muthukumara Vadivelavane | Thaipoosam Kavadi Murugan Song | Srihari | аЃЃаѓБаЃ§аѓНаЃ§аѓБаЃХаѓНаЃХаѓБаЃЃаЃ∞аЃЊ аЃµаЃЯаЃњаЃµаѓЗаЃ≤аЃµаЃ©аѓЗ
snippet.description:
вАЬMuthukumara VadivelavaneвАЭ is a high-energy Tamil Murugan devotional Kavadi song, composed and sung by Srihari, filled with raw devotion, rhythm, and divine power. This song is Track #1 from the album вАЬVettrivel MurugaвАЭ and is dedicated to Lord Murugan of Thiruchendur, one of the six sacred abodes of Murugan.

Inspired by the spirit of Kavadi Attam, this song captures the intense bhakti, fervour, and trance-like devotion of Murugan devotees who carry Kavadi with faith and surrender. The powerful and emotionally charged singing stands out, conveying the pain, passion, and ecstasy of true Murugan worship.

With pulsating temple rhythms, traditional folk beats, and heartfelt Tamil lyrics, Muthukumara Vadivelavane invokes Murugan as the Vel-wielding warrior god, the remover of obstacles, and the protector of devotees. The song is ideal for Kavadi processions, Murugan festivals, Thaipusam celebrations, devotional dance performances, and daily Murugan prayers.

Let the divine chant echo вАФ вАЬVettrivel Muruga! Vettrivel Muruga!вАЭ

Credits

Music & Sung by: Srihari Lyrics: Mugilan Concept & Direction: Srihari

Recorded & Mastered by: Srihari at Symphony Dream Factory, Chennai

Mixed at London by Guru of Nadham Audio Services

VFX Produced at: Symphony Dream Factory VFX Head: Venkat Gurdge

#Thaipusam2026 #VelMuruga #HinduDevotional

en-US.description:
Desi Fagan 2026 | Jorji Chamapawat | Asha Sapera Fagan | Rajasthani Song | Marwadi Fagan | New Marwadi Fagan 2026 | New Rajasthani Fagan 2026 | New Holi Song 2026 | @PRGMusicandFilmStudio

The second explosive installment of Desi Fagan is here! рЯО®рЯ•Б PRG Music presents a new and traditional Chang Fagan, "Jorji Champawat" (Desi Fagan Part 2), sung and choreographed by Asha Sapera.

With the beats of the Chang, the tinkling of the cymbals, and Asha Sapera's captivating dance, this song will give you the authentic Holi experience of Rajasthan (Holi 2026).

snippet.title: Jab Tum Aa Jaate Ho (Lyrical Video) | Sonu Nigam | Kavita Krishnamurthy | Revibe | Hindi Songs
snippet.description:
Jab Tum Aa Jaate Ho is a beautiful romantic melody sung by Sonu Nigam and Kavita Krishnamurthy, featuring Govinda and Manisha Koirala from the movie Maharaja. 
With its heartfelt lyrics and soothing composition, this song captures the warmth of love and the magical charm of 90s Bollywood romance. 

Credits: 
Singer: Sonu Nigam, Kavita Krishnamurthy
Music: Nadeem-Shravan
Lyrics: Sameer
Movie: Maharaja
Starring: Govinda, Manisha Koirala
Director: Anil Sharma
Producer: Naraindas Mukhija
Label: Universal Music India

Lyrics: 

Kuch geet labo pe sajte hai, 

Kuch saj dilo mein bajte hai 

Kuch geet labo pe sajte hai, 

Kuch saj dilo mein bajte hai 

Jab tum aa jate ho samne, 

Jab tum aa jate ho samne 

Jab tum aa jate ho samne, 

Jab tum aa jate ho samne 

  

  

Kuch geet labo pe sajte hai, 

Kuch saj dilo mein bajte hai 

Jab tum aa jate ho samne, 

Jab tum aa jate ho samne 

Jab tum aa jate ho samne, 

Jab tum aa jate ho samne 

  

Sham savere dekhu 

Tumko kitna suner roop hai 

Sham savere dekhu 

Tumko kitna suner roop hai 

Sang tumhare thandi 

Chaya sari duniya dhoop hai 

Mausam bhi rang badalte hai 

Mausam bhi rang badalte hai 

So dip najar me jalte hai 

Jab tum aa jate ho samne, 

Jab tum aa jate ho samne 

Jab tum aa jate ho samne, 

Jab tum aa jate ho samne 

  

  

Sun ke esi baate jane 

Kyon aankhe juk jaati hai 

Sun ke esi baate jane 

Kyon aankhe juk jaati hai 

Kuch baate hotho tak 

Aake jaane kyo rok jaati hai 

Ye jivan achaa lagta hai 

Ye jivan achaa lagta hai 

Har sapna sacha lagta hai 

Jab tum aa jate ho samne, 

Jab tum aa jate ho samne 

Jab tum aa jate ho samne, 

Jab tum aa jate ho samne 

  

  

Saat samandar se bhi 

Gahera dekho apna pyaar hai 

Saat samandar se bhi 

Gahera dekho apna pyaar hai 

Is ghar me ab har pal 

Har din khusiyo ka tyohar hai 

Wo gujre pal yaad aate hai 

Wo gujre pal yaad aate hai 

Wo bite kal yaad aate hai 

Jab tum aa jate ho samne, 

Jab tum aa jate ho samne 

Jab tum aa jate ho samne, 

Jab tum aa jate ho samne 

  

  

Kuch geet labo pe sajte hai, 

Kuch saj dilo mein bajte hai 

Jab tum aa jate ho samne, 

Jab tum aa jate ho samne 

Jab tum aa jate ho samne, 

Jab tum aa jate ho samne 

Jab tum aa jate ho samne, 

Jab tum aa jate ho samne
